title: Purely Plantbased Venezuelan Umeboshi Pilaf
description: A satvik-friendly, umami-rich pilaf featuring umeboshi and traditional Venezuelan flavors, cooked to perfection in a cataplana vessel using mushimono-steam method.
instructions: Heat the plantbased oil in the cataplana vessel over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and coriander seeds and let them sizzle for a minute.
Add the sliced onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Add the brown rice and stir to coat the rice in the oil and mix with the onion and garlic.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and umeboshi plums, stirring to combine.
Add the water to the cataplana vessel and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the vessel, and steam the pilaf for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let the pilaf rest, covered, for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
